description: Deploy filebrowser to HomeLab K3s cluster — web-based file manager for PC-to-PC file transfers at filebrowser.watarystack.org via Cloudflare Tunnel, with SOPS-encrypted secrets and GitOps-compliant base/overlay manifests

userStories.title: Create feature branch
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a feature branch so no changes land directly on main.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: git checkout main && git pull origin main && git checkout -b feat/add-filebrowser
Branch feat/add-filebrowser is checked out and up to date with main
git status shows clean working tree on feat/add-filebrowser

userStories.title: Create base namespace and PVC storage manifests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the namespace and persistent storage defined in base so the app has a place to store its database and user files.
acceptanceCriteria: Neither PVC has a storageClassName set (uses cluster default, matching existing apps)

userStories.title: Create base deployment manifest
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the deployment manifest so Kubernetes knows how to run filebrowser with correct volume mounts and config.
acceptanceCriteria: initContainer runs 'chown -R 1000:1000 /database /srv' before the main container starts (matching n8n pattern)
Resource requests: memory 128Mi, cpu 50m — limits: memory 256Mi, cpu 200m

userStories.title: Create base service and kustomization
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the ClusterIP service and base kustomization so the app is reachable inside the cluster and all base files are bundled.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/base/filebrowser/kustomization.yaml lists: namespace.yaml, storage.yaml, deployment.yaml, service.yaml
kustomize build apps/base/filebrowser/ completes with no errors

userStories.title: Create staging filebrowser ConfigMap
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the filebrowser settings.json delivered via ConfigMap so app configuration is version-controlled and not baked into the image.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/staging/filebrowser/filebrowser-config.yaml is a ConfigMap named 'filebrowser-config' in namespace 'filebrowser'
settings.json contains: port=80, address=0.0.0.0, root=/srv, database=/database/filebrowser.db, log=stdout, noauth=false

userStories.title: Create and encrypt Cloudflare tunnel secret and cloudflared deployment
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the tunnel credentials encrypted and the cloudflared sidecar deployment configured so external traffic can reach the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: kubectl create secret generic tunnel-credentials --from-file=credentials.json=/home/santi/.cloudflared/352eee72-576c-4669-9377-a17499aac4ea.json --dry-run=client -o yaml > apps/staging/filebrowser/cloudflare-secret.yaml
cloudflare-secret.yaml data field contains ENC[AES256_GCM (not plaintext)

apps/staging/filebrowser/cloudflare.yaml contains ConfigMap named 'cloudflared' with tunnel=filebrowser, credentials-file=/etc/cloudflared/creds/credentials.json, ingress hostname=filebrowser.watarystack.org → service=http://filebrowser:8088
cloudflare.yaml also contains cloudflared Deployment with 2 replicas, liveness probe on port 2000, mounts config ConfigMap and tunnel-credentials secret

userStories.title: Create and encrypt admin credentials secret
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the filebrowser admin username and password in a SOPS-encrypted Kubernetes secret so they are never exposed in plaintext in Git.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: kubectl create secret generic filebrowser-env-secret --from-literal=FB_USERNAME=fa020124_admin --from-literal=FB_PASSWORD=Adla7fhRkTWQ932oqJBk9dIy4pKG --dry-run=client -o yaml > apps/staging/filebrowser/filebrowser-env-secret.yaml
filebrowser-env-secret.yaml data field contains ENC[AES256_GCM (not plaintext)
grep -r 'Adla7fhRkTWQ932oqJBk9dIy4pKG' apps/ returns no matches (password not in plaintext anywhere in apps/)
userStories.notes: Credentials are for initial admin setup only. FB_USERNAME=fa020124_admin, FB_PASSWORD=Adla7fhRkTWQ932oqJBk9dIy4pKG — MUST be encrypted before commit.

userStories.title: Create staging kustomization and wire into main staging list
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the staging overlay kustomization completed and the app registered in the root staging kustomization so FluxCD discovers and deploys it.
acceptanceCriteria: apps/staging/filebrowser/kustomization.yaml resources list includes: ../../base/filebrowser/, cloudflare.yaml, cloudflare-secret.yaml, filebrowser-env-secret.yaml, filebrowser-config.yaml
kustomize build apps/staging/filebrowser/ completes with no errors

userStories.title: Commit all files and open pull request
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all manifests committed to the feature branch and a PR opened so changes can be reviewed before hitting the cluster.
acceptanceCriteria: git add apps/base/filebrowser/ apps/staging/filebrowser/ apps/staging/kustomization.yaml tasks/
git commit with message 'feat: add filebrowser to homelab'
gh pr create --base main --head feat/add-filebrowser with title 'feat: add filebrowser to homelab'
PR body includes: image (filebrowser/filebrowser:latest), port (8088), hostname (filebrowser.watarystack.org), tunnel UUID (352eee72-576c-4669-9377-a17499aac4ea)
PR body includes manual DNS checklist: CNAME filebrowser → 352eee72-576c-4669-9377-a17499aac4ea.cfargotunnel.com (proxied)
userStories.notes: Do not merge until DNS CNAME record is added in Cloudflare dashboard.
